detail: Data-driven item/economy database for Goblin Empire. Designed to prevent siloed skills by connecting resources, recipes, drops, nodes, shops, GP, and progression unlocks.
Every item should have a source, use, interaction, GP value, and connection to at least one other skill/system.
1072 item records included. Target was at least 800.
Items have inventory actions; world nodes have use/tool/skill requirements; recipes define station interactions; monsters feed drops into crafting/economy.
Use JSON or SQLite as source of truth; spreadsheet is for design/balance review.
